title: AcVerdict (2-facet)
description: The BUILD-TARGET's acVerdict, extended so correctness ⊥ application are separate, required facets (§5.8 wire-or-drop). This is the output shape slice[0] produces INSIDE rebuild/ — it is a build product, authored by the build against the locked rebuild/schemas SoT, NOT a harness type. The write-time gate rejects a capability-change AC that lacks planned_application_oracle; the verify-time gate checks observed_application_evidence for truth. Whether this extends rebuild/schemas' acVerdict in place or lives as a sibling schema is an open question (see OPEN-QUESTIONS.md).

evidence.description: Correctness-facet evidence (mirrors rebuild/schemas evidence: reference-carrying, no inline content).

planned_application_oracle.description: Write-time, falsifiable spec of how the applied/live behavior WILL be checked. Write-time gate: presence + falsifiability only (not truth). Required for a capability-change AC.

observed_application_evidence.description: Verify-time evidence that the applied behavior was actually reached through the live path. Verify-time gate checks truth. Absent until verification.
